reviews.review_description: It says in the description that multiplayer will be added later. Any time scale on this? It will be a total game changer. Soon please.

reviews.review_title: Game feels more like a demo
reviews.review_description: The inner childhood initially got excited about a tank game being on VR based on the old tank console games. However, as much as i tried to be open minded i cant help but feel like this game is more of a demo than a finished product. Besides the cool background rock music, theres not much of note to i. The graphics are very basic and it’s always the same red brick enclosed environment. After a few rounds, there wasnt much to keep me engaged. If there different settings you could choose, different tanks or different ammo types for different enemy tank types, thst would pea my interest. And not sure if just was an error on my part, but the actual action of shooting was inconsistent. I believe you press and hold down the trigger, then let go after a couple of seconds. Randomly it would work and other times wouldnt work doing the same action. This game is a great idea but i just cant help feeling wanting much more than i was getting.

developer_response.body:
Hi TheTwinkie9, and thank you for your review!
We’re glad to hear you’re enjoying the music. As for the rest of your feedback, we aimed to stay true to the spirit of the original classic, recreating the same levels and enemies to capture that retro vibe. The visuals were intentionally kept in that style, but we’ve enhanced the music and gameplay dynamics to make it more engaging and suitable for VR.

Regarding the shooting mechanics, there is a reload time shown on the barrel (ammo icon). This reload speed varies depending on the type of ammo you pick up during the game. Once the barrel is reloaded, you can shoot again. Hope that clears it up!

Thanks again for your feedback — we’ll definitely keep it in mind as we continue developing future titles.

reviews.review_description:
Of course there needs to be some more update for this game, but it really reminds me of my childhood when I played tank game on the old console. 

For this game I am the tank and it was fps game. 

The AI needs to be updated so they should be smarter. 

Other than that, I really enjoy the game.
I love this little gem. It reminds me of Battlezone. Sure it is a little basic but the driving and combat are fun so that’s all that matters. I’m looking forward to see where this one goes.

I went in with an open mind, but this was a frustrating experience. While I respect that this is a solo dev project, the final product feels extremely unpolished.

The graphics are very basic, even by indie standards, and the music doesn’t add to the experience. The core gameplay is extremely simple, with little to keep players engaged. The controls work, and the menu functions as expected, but beyond that, there isn’t much to praise.

For a paid title, especially at its current price, I find it hard to recommend. The game might have had potential if it offered multiplayer or deeper mechanics, but as it stands, it feels more like a tech demo than a full game. If future updates bring significant improvements, I’d be open to revisiting it.
Feeling old-school

What a cool little gem!  Tank Town reminds me of the old school Tank Commander game which pits you against other players in a grid-like environment but now in the VR world!  As per the dev's suggestion, for those who get motion sick easily it's probably better to play sitting in a swivel chair so that you can swivel the turret via the chair instead of the joystick and then utilize the other joystick to move forward and backwards.  Can't wait to try and defend my base against my friends online!  I can see this providing many hours of entertainment once I get other friends on the app!  Thanks, Sebastian!

To be honest this game is a motion sickness vampire. Tank turns could be 2x faster, as it takes really long time. For the flag, it could go down so you can see from far away that base is taken. Maybe some mines drop could be good. And most of all, maps could be way bigger and other tanks could spawn in different places, as after couple of maches you just shoot to the corner from your spawn and kill instantly many enemys. Compared to other games, this game get strong 9 out of 10 from me! Most recommended! Thanks Devs, keep it updated♡

I'm a big fan of old school games like Combat for the Atari 2600, and this game attempts to bring similar gameplay into VR.  It does succeed at that.  The tank is easy to control, and there are new and varied maps that keep you on your toes.  I did find the gameplay itself to get old fast.  There are allegedly 50 levels to tackle, but by level 7 or so, I was just too bored to continue.  It also currently lacks instructions on victory conditions for the different game modes, so you may have to, like I did, guess for a while till you figure things out.  Maybe it'll be a game you enjoy.  It just wasn't for me.

reviews.review_title: Great little game for tank lovers 😃
reviews.review_description: Brought back memories of the good old days with tanks. Great fun and an immersive VR experience.

It reminds me a little of the old Atari Combat game.
Go around a small grid map, eliminating all the enemy.

The movement is nice and didn’t make me feel queasy.

There is various modes… attack, defend, capture flag. 3 levels of difficulty.

During game play you can pick up power ups for your armour, a base repair, shield for your tank, weapon upgrade.

Blast away walls to fight your way to the enemy or their base.

Would be better with bigger maps.

Not too much to this game, but it is an easy, casual game that’s not very stressful.
Lovely little retro style shooter with very intuitive controls. You can’t help but get competitive when playing

So if you like old school tank games, this has to be on your radar. 
You control your tank turret by moving your arm, 
The concept is very neat.
3 game modes
Tank Attack 
Tank defence 
& my favourite capture the flag, where you can go up to 50 levels.
Very simple to play and hours of fun for any Tank enthusiast .
Well done to the dev.
This is a really cool old school Atari Game to the new school arcade games!

This is an easy to learn intuitive game, i have really enjoyed playing this, it would be a good game with your friends especially capture the flag, i will be interested to see how the game develops in the future. Definitely one for your library
Super good game, my husband LOVED showing my son how fun tanks can be.
Great game. Very reminiscent about video games in the '80s. After playing this I think I am going to get a swivel chair to use. I think it would be great to be able to spin around while playing.

This game is great, it reminds me of the 80’s classic Tank Battalion! 

Using your arm to control the tanks gun turret,  and trigger to shoot enemy tanks, while using the thumb sticks to direct the tank and rotate! 

Capture the flag is a great play mode, along side other challenging modes. 

This would be so much fun in multiplayer which I see is on the horizon 

Great game with intuitive physics
The best tank game!!!!!

reviews.review_title: An Original and Refreshing Tank Game!
reviews.review_description: This game offers excellent handling of the tank—typically clunky and slow in most games, but here it's impressively responsive. The three different modes bring variety and keep the experience fresh. The physics for shooting and dodging are spot-on, adding a satisfying challenge. I’m excited about the potential for a multiplayer option in the future! The short, engaging party-style gameplay is perfect for quick sessions and makes this a standout title. Highly recommended for anyone looking for something fun and original!
